items.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
items.note: The prologue and first act story/world building were really good. I felt it was weird how they dumped all the side stuff to act 3, which caused pacing to be weird. I feel this is a good step for turn based RPGs and hopefully will make the next games learn from it. For those who come after.

items.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong
items.note: Metroidvania at it's finest, the multiple paths to reach the same area and how you are never sure if you're doing a cheesy strat or if it's the intended route was fun. Gaunlet fights are annoying as hell, and fuck Bilewater.

items.title: Blue Prince
items.note: Took over my life for a week. The pacing can be a bit all over due to the nature of the randomness. The best part was playing it while everyone else was still playing and talking to people about it.

items.title: Death Stranding 2: On the Beach
items.note: Kojima being kojima, the game makes absolutely no sense and there shouldn't be a reason why I enjoyed it so much. The plot is nonsense and you're just there for the weird vibes. The game became a bit too combat focused for my liking, but the idea of building a network and seeing how the community comes together to make the game easier was really good (Not a new idea since Death Stranding 1 already did it but still I enjoyed it)

items.title: Football Manager 2024
items.note: Management games just hook you up, learned more about soccer strats, both in and out of the pitch. Not much to say about it besides an excelent waste of time. Maybe in another life instead of FM24 I would have been hooked up on Uma Musume.

items.title: No One Writes Back
items.creator: Eun-Jin Jang
items.note: At the beginning, it felt like another novel about nothing but as the pages turned I found myself captivated by the rollercoaster of emotions that it evoked in me.

items.title: Salvation of a Saint
items.creator: Keigo Higashino
items.note: yet another thrilling chapter in the detective galileo series.

items.title: No Other Choice
items.creator: Park Chan-wook
items.note: Beautiful movie, great acting and incredible funny moments. I enjoyed it a lot.

items.title: Marty Supreme
items.creator: Josh Safdie
items.note: If you looking for a ping pong movie, you'll be dissapointed. Otherwise great movie.

items.title: Conclave
items.creator: Edward Berger
items.note: It was pretty enthralling to watch. Cinematography and costume design was on point.
